summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Special Price Request feature from checkout. Feature is working correctly - users can request/apply special prices directly from checkout step 2 via 'Minta Harga Khusus' button without navigating to Pusat Persetujuan menu. Admin flow (approve & apply), validation, and UI elements all verified working.
passed_tests: ✅ 'Minta Harga Khusus' button appears on checkout step 2 for items without existing special price (testid: request-special-price-{productId})
✅ Button opens RequestSpecialPriceModal with correct testid (request-special-price-modal)
✅ All required form fields present: rsp-price, rsp-minqty, rsp-validuntil, rsp-reason
✅ Admin role: 'Setujui & Terapkan' button present (testid: rsp-approve)
✅ Request button present for all roles (testid: rsp-request - 'Ajukan untuk Approval')
✅ Validation works: price >= normal price shows error via rsp-error testid with message 'Harga khusus harus lebih rendah dari harga normal'
✅ Backend API chain working: POST /api/price-approvals (create) → POST /api/price-approvals/{id}/approve (approve) → GET /api/price-approvals/effective (fetch)
✅ Customer selection required before button appears (button disabled when no customer)
✅ Button hidden when item already has special price (replaced by badge)
✅ Note displayed explaining special price feature: 'Potongan harga hanya via Harga Khusus. Klik Minta Harga Khusus di tiap item untuk mengajukan langsung dari sini (disetujui manager/admin)'
✅ Backend logs confirm grand total updated correctly when special price applied (27722250 → 22477500)

additional_notes.sales_role_test: Sales role test navigation timed out during logout/re-login flow, but code review confirms canApprove logic is correct: rsp-approve button only renders when canApprove=true (admin/manager roles). Sales role will only see rsp-request button.
additional_notes.special_price_badge: When special price is approved & applied, the 'Minta Harga Khusus' button is replaced by cart-item-special-{productId} badge showing discounted price with struck-through normal price, and cart-item-sp-notice-{productId} notice appears.
additional_notes.backend_verified: Backend create→approve→effective chain fully functional per logs. Special prices correctly applied to order totals.
additional_notes.governance_maintained: Feature maintains governance: sales can only request (pending status), admin/manager can approve & apply directly from checkout.
additional_notes.testids_complete: All required testids present and correctly implemented per specification.
